privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD task (not based on real data). The task requires creating a symmetrical kayak hull station drawing in LibreCAD. Key verified values: Output file path is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/kayak_station_4.dxf. Three layers must be created: MOLD (hull outline), JIG (construction lines), and TEXT (labels). The hull geometry is defined by coordinate points—keel at origin (0, 0), right chine at (240, 120), right sheer at (290, 320), and deck peak at (0, 360), with left-side mirroring. Construction lines include a strongback at Y=500 and a centerline. All metadata coordinates and properties are consistent across task description, verification scripts, and setup scripts.
